items.title: Hitachi Black Side By Side Refrigerator
items.description: Hitachi black side-by-side refrigerator freezer with water dispenser and premium glossy finish. Model R-H76HPU, made in Thailand. Rated voltage 220-240V, 50Hz, weight 99kg, refrigerant R600a. Pre-owned condition, see photos for exterior finish and product label details. Warranty valid till 2031.
